title: 301RedirectImportExportJobRead
description: Full detail of a Redirect Import-Export job.

completed_items.description: The number of items that were successfully imported or exported.

failed_items.description: The number of items that were not successfully imported or exported.

total_items.description: The number of items in the import or export job.

created_at.description: The date-time that the import-export job was created, formatted as an [RFC-3339](https://www.ietf.org/rfc/rfc3339.txt) string.

completed_at.description: The date-time that the import-export job was completed, formatted as an [RFC-3339](https://www.ietf.org/rfc/rfc3339.txt) string.
